name: ConceptCF: Concept-based Counterfactuals for the Explainability of Time Series

description: arXiv:2607.18748v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper proposes ConceptCF, a method for counterfactual generation that operates on human-interpretable concepts. In high-stakes domains such as healthcare and predictive maintenance, artificial intelligence models can increase efficiency and safety. Explainability is key to ensure these models rely on causal relationships rather than spuriou...
author: Annemarie Jutte, Faizan Ahmed, Jeroen Linssen, Maurice van Keulen
